creator: jsc@ntu.edu.tw
text:
(In reply to Christos Chatzaras from comment #54)

It works again on FreeBSD 14.0-RC1!
Thanks everyone!

1. H/W: VM on vmware workstation 17
2. OS: FreeBSD 14.0-RC1
3. freetds 1.4.2,1 installed using pkg
4. destination database: Microsoft SQL Server 2019

some message from TDSDUMP:
